name: Quesadillas with Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a frying pan and sauté the mushrooms until they are soft.
2. Spread a spoonful of cheese on half of each tortilla, leaving a 1 cm margin around the edge.
3. Place the mushrooms on the cheese-covered side of the tortilla.
4. Brush the edges of the tortilla with beaten egg.
5. Fold the tortilla in half and press the edges firmly together to seal.
6. Pour vegetable oil into a deep frying pan to a depth of 1 cm. Heat until a cube of bread turns brown in 1 minute.
7. Fry the quesadillas, 2 or 3 at a time, for 2 minutes on each side until they are browned.
8. Drain on kitchen paper and serve with tomatoes, cucumber, and coriander sprigs to garnish.
Calories: 320 per serving
